title: Soundaria - Terraria Soundtrack (Reactive Music songpack)
description: Replaces classic Minecraft music with Terraria OST that plays depending on dimension, biome, structures, time, weather and other criteria.
body:
This resourcepack replaces classic Minecraft music with Terraria soundtrack that plays depending on dimension, biome, time, weather and other criteria.
# How to install the resource pack
- Download [Reactive Music mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music) ([unofficial 26.1 port](https://github.com/KevBelisle/ReactiveMusic-Cont/releases))
- Download this resource pack
- Open Reactive Music settings (use [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or `/reactivemusic` command in the world)
- Choose **Soundaria - Terraria Soundtrack in Minecraft** in the list
  - More info about two versions available in the list is lower

## The songpack includes soundtrack from:
_Main_ and _vanilla-only_ versions:
- Terraria itself composed by Scott Lloyd Shelly of [Resonance Array](https://resonancearray.com)

_Main_ version only:
- [Spirit mod](https://www.youtube.com/@TheSpiritMod) for Terraria composed by [Sbubby](https://www.youtube.com/@Sbubby) and [Salvati](https://www.soundcloud.com/symeme) 

### Resource pack features music reactive to dimensions, biomes, structures, time of day, weather and also:
- Main menu music
- Village music
- Bosses music
- Credits music
- Fishing music
